title: Lifesteal
description: Minigame of the lifesteal. When you kill a player you will steal one-half of their lifebar
body:
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602462b0d99577d69077e524637e50af1235a2d5.png)

**Lifesteal** adds a thrilling new mechanic to Minecraft survival and PvP worlds. With this datapack, every battle truly matters — because when you kill another player, you steal half a heart from their maximum health.

![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/671e8d295afa54a12627802b0df964ef42ca0753.png) ## ⚔️ How it works - **Whenever a player dies at your hands, you permanently gain +0.5 hearts**. - **The defeated player permanently loses the same amount**. - **Over time, strong players become stronger, while others must fight to regain their lost hearts**. ## 🌍 Perfect for multiplayer Whether you’re running a small friends’ world or a public PvP server, Lifesteal fits seamlessly. It’s easy to install, **lightweight**, and **fully compatible with the latest Minecraft versions**. ## 🔥 Challenge your limits Grow stronger with each kill, defend your hard-earned hearts, and rise to become the most powerful survivor. But beware — one mistake could cost you everything. Only the strongest will survive in the world of Lifesteal. ## Other links [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1939f49bcb6e53e1f7c526c007eeb1be4a69aeb2.png)‎](https://it.fiverr.com/diesse2007) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/169f5456fb11650701a2af7890b911e62386388e_0.webp)‎](https://x.com/dskianto) [![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c38479243db42f491e3674a0ccda6de2c934b7f.png)‎](https://wanmine.net/)
